meta.title: Request Technical Inspection | GEONYX
meta.description: Request a free technical floor inspection by a GEONYX engineer. We diagnose the loads and risks and prepare a personalised engineering proposal.

hero.title: REQUEST FOR ENGINEERING AUDIT AND SYSTEM SPECIFICATION
hero.subtitle: Our engineers will analyse the structural requirements, operational environment and specific risks of your facility to design the precise geopolymer matrix.

process.title: PROCESS
process.step1Body: Technical interview to define industry type, chemical or mechanical aggression and project scale.
process.step2Body: On-site engineering survey – from tensile strength and substrate moisture to thermal amplitude assessment and regulatory requirements.
process.step3Body: Preparation of a detailed protocol with a hybrid solution (Method Statement), cost estimation and technological execution plan.

form.title: REQUEST FORM
form.subtitle: Fill in the form and one of our engineers will contact you
form.threatsLabel: PRIMARY RISK FACTOR (MORE THAN ONE ALLOWED)
form.successBody: Your project has been registered in the system with high priority. One of our engineers will contact you within 24 hours.
